content.original: They began building the tunnel eighteen months ago.
content.answer: They have been building the tunnel for eighteen months.

content.original: When was the planet Pluto discovered?
content.answer: How long ago was the planet Pluto discovered?

content.original: He has never felt so embarrassed before.
content.answer: It's the first time he has ever felt so embarrassed.

content.original: They raided the fridge as soon as their mother had left.
content.answer: They didn't raid the fridge until their mother had left.

content.original: I've never met such an immature person!
content.answer: She's the most immature person I've ever met!

content.original: France hasn't won a gold medal in this sport for a long time.
content.answer: It's a long time since France won a gold medal in this sport.

content.original: I started studying law two years ago.
content.answer: I have been studying law for two years.

content.original: How long ago did you realise the truth?
content.answer: How long is it since you realised the truth?

content.original: The doctor didn't start the operation until the anaesthetic had taken effect.
content.answer: The doctor waited until the anaesthetic had taken effect before starting the operation.

content.original: He realised his mistake when it was too late.
content.answer: He didn't realise his mistake until it was too late.

content.original: It's the most ridiculous suggestion I've ever heard!
content.answer: I've never heard such a ridiculous suggestion!

content.original: When did you last see Paul?
content.answer: When was the last time you saw Paul?

content.original: After he had finished his homework, he went for a walk.
content.answer: Having finished his homework, he went for a walk.

content.question: Since I came to work, you ___ nothing but complain!
content.answer: have done

content.question: As soon as they ___ stolen, they called the police.
content.answer: realised their car had been

content.question: We drove very slowly because snow ___ heavily.
content.answer: was falling

content.question: We didn't realise we'd forgotten the tickets until we ___ to the airport.
content.answer: got

content.question: By December 15th we ___ in Greece for two months.
content.answer: will have been

content.question: Don't phone Mark now it's late and he ___ bed.
content.answer: will have gone to

content.original: I believe it's going to rain.
content.answer: I have a feeling that it's going to rain.

content.original: I haven't been to the cinema for weeks.
content.answer: It's a long time since I went to the cinema.
The contest will be held tomorrow.

content.original: She started cleaning as soon as the children had left.
content.answer: She didn't start cleaning until the children had left.

content.original: It's certain that they'll be late.
content.answer: They are bound to be late.

content.original: Was her call answered by anyone?
content.answer: Did anyone answer her call?
